instant.comment: No animation — immediate state changes, reduced-motion fallback.

normal.comment: Default — dropdown open, tooltip show, tab switch.

slow.comment: Larger transitions — modal enter, drawer slide, page change.

deliberate.comment: Reserved for loading states and progress indicators.

default.comment: Standard ease-in-out. Use for most transitions.

enter.comment: Elements entering the screen — ease out.

exit.comment: Elements leaving the screen — ease in.

spring.comment: Playful overshoot — mobile bottom sheets, success states.
